governance_comment: Critical-modules list is GOVERNED in docs/03-testing-strategy.md §11 — adding a module is an ADR, removing requires a retrospective. Do not edit the scope here without that.
ignoreStatic_comment: Mutation targets RUNTIME logic. ids.ts is module-load static initialisation (branded-id factories + Zod metadata); its guard is ids.test.ts accept/reject + the brandedIdPattern drift test, not mutation — so static-only mutants are ignored (they report n/a).
